hero.subtitle1: I develop robust backend APIs, AI models,

about.description: I am a passionate Applied Computer Science student at Thomas More University, specializing in Application Development and Artificial Intelligence (APP/AI). With a strong foundation in backend engineering (C#, .NET, Python) and modern web frameworks (React), I thrive in Agile environments. I am a quick learner, always eager to tackle complex problems and build scalable, intelligent, and user-centric solutions.

experience.sectionSubText: What I have done so far

woonboog.title: VBA Developer & IT Support
points: Developed an automated VBA application within Excel to calculate property profitability (rent vs. sell) based on dynamic parameters like the number of bathrooms.
Transformed complex manual spreadsheets into intuitive, user-friendly dashboards with automated graphs and clear visual indicators (red/green) to assist decision-making.
Hired as a student worker following a successful one-month internship to finalize and deploy the financial application.
Provided active IT Helpdesk support, resolving daily technical issues for employees and assisting with office infrastructure.
